function.name: search_recipes
function.description: Search IngredientPals for published recipes. Supports free-text queries and structured filters. Use this to look up existing recipes before creating a new one.

q.description: Free-text query matched against title, description, ingredients, instructions, and tags. Leave empty to browse.

mealTypes.description: Filter by meal type (breakfast, dinner, dessert, ...).

function.name: get_recipe
function.description: Fetch the full details of a single PUBLISHED recipe by numeric id. Use this before entering cooking mode so you have every ingredient and instruction.

function.name: create_recipe_draft
function.description: Create or iteratively update the user's active DRAFT recipe from exactly ONE of: a text prompt, a remote image URL, an inline base64 image, a web URL, or a YouTube URL. The result is a draft, NOT a published recipe. Call this multiple times to iterate: each call merges the new input with the existing draft via AI. Present the draft to the human, let them request more prompts, then call publish_draft when they are happy.

prompt.description: Free-text instruction. On first call: the initial recipe idea. On later calls: a tweak ('less spicy', 'swap beef for mushroom', 'add a side').

imageUrl.description: http(s) URL of a PNG/JPEG/WebP image showing a recipe (note, screenshot, cookbook page).

data.description: Base64-encoded image bytes (data: prefix tolerated). Max 8 MB decoded.

url.description: http(s) URL of a web page with a recipe; server fetches and extracts it.
youtube.com or youtu.be URL of a cooking video.

function.name: remix_recipe_draft
function.description: Create an iterative DRAFT that remixes an existing published recipe. On first call, the base is the published source recipe; on later calls, the base is the latest draft. The response returns sourceRecipeId and remixPrompt — remember these and pass them to publish_draft so the published recipe is properly linked to its source.

prompt.description: Plain-language remix instruction ('make it vegan', 'halve the sugar, add ginger').

function.name: get_current_draft
function.description: Fetch the current active draft for this user. Returns { draft: null } if there is none. Use this to re-read the draft when you need to present it to the human, or to check what was last generated.

function.name: discard_draft
function.description: Delete the current active draft without publishing. Use when the user wants to start over or abandon the work.

function.name: publish_draft
function.description: Publish the current active draft as a real recipe owned by the user. The published recipe is queued for moderation. If the draft was produced by remix_recipe_draft, pass sourceRecipeId and remixPrompt (returned by the last remix_recipe_draft call) so the server records the remix linkage.

sourceRecipeId.description: Optional. Set only when publishing a remix; use the value returned by remix_recipe_draft.

remixPrompt.description: Optional. The remix instruction text. Pair with sourceRecipeId.

autoGenerateImage.description: Whether to auto-generate an image if the draft has none.
